column1: I confirm this source file should be moved into recoverable trash, not permanently deleted.
column2: 我确认此源码文件应移动到可恢复回收站，而不是永久删除。

column1: Queues one existing source-policy file into recoverable .wls-trash. Single file only, max 128 KB; directories, purge, hard delete, upload, and broad source queues stay disabled.
column2: 将一个已存在的源码策略文件加入可恢复 .wls-trash 队列。仅限单文件，最大 128 KB；目录、永久清理、硬删除、上传和宽泛源码队列仍保持禁用。

column1: I confirm this source file should be queued for recoverable trash, not permanently deleted.
column2: 我确认此源码文件应加入可恢复回收队列，而不是永久删除。

column1: Queues one existing source-policy file into a server-side archive under var/wls-panel/file-manager/source-archives. Single file only, max 128 KB; directories, source-root zip writes, upload, delete, and overwrite stay disabled.
column2: 将一个已存在的源码策略文件加入服务端归档队列，归档写入 var/wls-panel/file-manager/source-archives。仅限单文件，最大 128 KB；目录、源码根目录旁写 zip、上传、删除和覆盖仍保持禁用。

column1: I confirm this source file should be archived through a read-only queue.
column2: 我确认此源码文件应通过只读队列归档。

column1: Queues one existing source-policy child directory into a server-side archive under var/wls-panel/file-manager/source-archives. Max 200 entries and 10 MB; the source tree is only read by the worker.
column2: 将一个已存在的源码策略子目录加入只读归档队列，归档产物保存到 var/wls-panel/file-manager/source-archives。最多 200 个条目、10 MB；worker 只读取源码树。

column1: I confirm this source directory should be archived through a read-only queue.
column2: 我确认通过只读队列归档这个源码目录。
创建源码目录归档队列

column1: Queues up to 20 files or child directories from the current source-policy directory into one read-only archive under var/wls-panel/file-manager/source-archives. Max 200 archived entries and 10 MB; no source-root ZIP writes, upload, delete, or overwrite.
column2: 将当前源码策略目录内最多 20 个文件或子目录加入一个只读归档队列，归档产物写入 var/wls-panel/file-manager/source-archives。最多 200 个归档条目和 10 MB；不允许在源码根目录旁写 ZIP、上传、删除或覆盖。

column1: I confirm these selected source entries should be archived through a read-only queue.
column2: 我确认这些选中的源码条目应通过只读队列归档。
创建源码多选归档队列

column1: Moves the target into the same root .wls-trash folder. Completed jobs can be restored from the recent queue list while the original path is still free.
column2: 将目标移动到同一根目录下的 .wls-trash 文件夹。完成的任务只要原始路径仍空闲，就可以从最近队列列表恢复。

column1: I confirm this target should be moved into recoverable trash, not permanently deleted.
column2: 我确认此目标应移动到可恢复回收站，而不是永久删除。

column1: Only queue-created trash entries are listed here. Restore remains available only while the original path is still free and the .wls-trash entry exists. Permanent purge requires explicit PURGE_TRASH confirmation.
column2: 这里只显示通过队列创建的回收条目。只有原始路径仍空闲且 .wls-trash 条目存在时才允许恢复。永久清理需要显式输入 PURGE_TRASH 确认。

column1: 我确认永久删除此回收条目。
column2: 我确认永久删除此回收条目。
